## Changelog
* 1b973f80954500e5070346a89d6eba45a8b808b6 feat: initial commit - SSH signing service for AI agents
* 3e339c14aba3d61a32aa384f2ff37623f06fcf01 fix: force ANSI256 color profile for SSH sessions
* 847066d55c5f9ff0a7529386a6775f267f3de853 fix: gitignore was excluding cmd/ directories
* 0dd6dde8d0dc0b5ecab29d135589138648522373 fix: immudb client session handling
* b212b07db24d35e85ba92486ebde739823391ad0 fix: use per-session lipgloss renderer for SSH color support
